sources.label: EPA SDWIS Texas snapshot
notes: SDWIS rows are self-reported by primacy agencies; recent quarters lag.
Snapshot is filtered to TX health-based violations after 2023-04-01; widen via fetchSdwis({since: undefined}) and write to data/ (gitignored) for analysis runs.
county is sourced from GEOGRAPHIC_AREA (area_type_code=CN); some PWSs are missing this row.
EJ outputs derived from this should be framed as exposure / burden, not harm.

sources.label: ACS county population snapshot
notes: Population coverage is limited to the committed ACS county snapshot currently in public/cache/acs-county-tx.json.

sources.label: TCEQ surface-water-quality snapshot
notes: County-level pressure uses impaired segment counts from the cached surface-water snapshot.

sources.label: TWDB hydrology snapshot
notes: Hydrology is used here only for centroid/bounding-box context so Wave 2 consumers can add map overlays later.
